ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "category_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category group */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific category */,
  "budgeted" REAL /* Budgeted amount for the transaction */,
  "spent" REAL /* Amount spent in the transaction */,
  "available" REAL /* Available balance after the transaction */,
  "total" REAL /* Total of the transaction */,
  "saved" REAL /* Savings achieved from the transaction */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of transaction (income, expense) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context for the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_category_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_group_id") REFERENCES category_groups ("category_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_groups" (
  "category_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category group */,
  "category_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the category group (e.g., Savings, Borrow/Lend) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category group */,
  "parent_category_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category group */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the category group (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Raghav, Ravi, CHI '17 Funds) */,
  "category_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category group the category belongs to */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the category (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, advisor, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this budget belongs to */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the user */,
  "remaining_budget" REAL /* Remaining budget after transactions */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the budget is set */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the budget is set */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency of the budget */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context for the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code for the currency (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate relative to a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (e.g., income, expense) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the transaction type (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of transaction being changed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., client, advisor) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the role (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was revoked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
